rule_metadata.author: Li Ling, Andy Parkidomo, Robert Rakowski, Blake Hartstein (Bloomberg L.P.)
rule_metadata.title: Shell Execution via Find - Linux

rules.rule_text:
title: Shell Execution via Find - Linux
id: 6adfbf8f-52be-4444-9bac-81b539624146
status: test
description: 'Detects the use of the find command to execute a shell. Such behavior
  may be associated with privilege escalation, unauthorized command execution, or
  exploitation attempt.

  '
references:
- https://gtfobins.github.io/gtfobins/find/#shell
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/linux-restricted-shell-breakout-via-linux-binary-s.html
author: Li Ling, Andy Parkidomo, Robert Rakowski, Blake Hartstein (Bloomberg L.P.)
date: 2024-09-02
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1083
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith: /find
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - ' . '
    - -exec
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - /bin/bash
    - /bin/dash
    - /bin/fish
    - /bin/sh
    - /bin/zsh
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
